executives.name: Leigh Curyer
executives.background: Mr. Curyer is the founder, President, and CEO of NexGen Energy Ltd. He has over 20 years of experience in the resources sector.

executives.name: Marty Tunney
executives.background: Mr. Tunney is a mining engineer with over 20 years of experience in the resource sector, including roles at Newmont and CIBC.

executives.name: Peter Netupsky
executives.background: Mr. Netupsky has over 15 years of experience in corporate development and investment banking, previously with Agnico Eagle Mines.

executives.name: Philip Williams
executives.background: Mr. Williams has over 20 years of experience in the mining and finance industries. He was previously the CEO of Consolidated Uranium Inc. before its merger with IsoEnergy. He has held various roles in equity research and investment banking.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Netupsky
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Netupsky has over 15 years of experience in corporate development and investment banking, previously with Agnico Eagle Mines.
